summary: Complete testing of Phase 7 (Reportes Gerenciales). Backend: 35/35 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - 10 KPI cards in CFO Executive Summary, 5 CSV export buttons in Exportar Reportes section, sidebar navigation with 'Reportes Gerenciales' entry. Fixed bug in exportar_gastos endpoint (g.tercero_id -> g.proveedor_id).

backend_api.GET /api/reportes/resumen-ejecutivo?empr: PASS - Returns complete CFO summary with tesoreria, cxc, cxp, ventas_mtd, gastos_mtd, utilidad_mtd, pendientes_confirmar, liquidez_neta
backend_api.resumen-ejecutivo tesoreria structure: PASS - Returns caja, banco, total fields
backend_api.resumen-ejecutivo cxc structure: PASS - Returns documentos, total, vencido fields
backend_api.resumen-ejecutivo cxp structure: PASS - Returns documentos, total, vencido fields
backend_api.resumen-ejecutivo liquidez_neta calculat: PASS - Correctly calculates disponible_total + cxc_total - cxp_total
backend_api.GET /api/reportes/exportar/cxc?empresa_i: PASS - Returns CSV with correct headers
backend_api.exportar/cxc CSV headers: PASS - Has ID, Cliente, Monto Original, Saldo Pendiente, Estado, Vencimiento, Dias Atraso
backend_api.GET /api/reportes/exportar/cxp?empresa_i: PASS - Returns CSV with correct headers
backend_api.exportar/flujo-caja CSV headers: PASS - Has Fecha, Ingresos, Egresos, Flujo Neto, Saldo Acumulado
backend_api.exportar/rentabilidad CSV headers: PASS - Has Marca, Ingreso, Gasto, Utilidad, Margen %
backend_api.exportar/gastos CSV headers: PASS - Has ID, Fecha, Descripcion, Proveedor, Categoria, Subtotal, IGV, Total

frontend_ui.Page title: PASS - 'Reportes Gerenciales' with subtitle 'Resumen ejecutivo y exportacion de datos'
frontend_ui.KPI Card - Ventas MTD: PASS - Shows S/ 764.00 with '1 ventas confirmadas'
frontend_ui.KPI Card - Pendientes Confirmar: PASS - Shows '0' with 'Ventas POS sin validar'
frontend_ui.KPI Card - CxC Pendientes: PASS - Shows S/ 3,700.50 with '6 docs | Vencido: S/ 2,950.50'
frontend_ui.KPI Card - CxP Pendientes: PASS - Shows S/ 3,000.00 with '2 docs | Vencido: S/ 2,500.00'
frontend_ui.Date filters Desde/Hasta: PASS - Both date inputs visible with data-testid
frontend_ui.Navigation to /reportes-gerenciales: PASS - Clicking sidebar link navigates correctly

bugs_fixed.issue: exportar_gastos endpoint returning 500 error - column g.tercero_id does not exist
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed g.tercero_id to g.proveedor_id in the SQL query, also added g.beneficiario_nombre fallback and joined cont_gasto_linea for categoria

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from previous phases
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 (Reportes Gerenciales - final phase) fully tested and working. Backend endpoints in /app/backend/routers/reportes_gerenciales.py: resumen-ejecutivo returns CFO dashboard KPIs, 5 export endpoints return CSV files. Fixed bug in exportar_gastos (g.tercero_id changed to g.proveedor_id). Frontend page /reportes-gerenciales shows 10 KPI cards and 5 CSV export buttons. Export URL functions in api.js construct direct URLs for window.open. Sidebar has 'Reportes Gerenciales' as 5th item in Finanzas Gerenciales section.
